error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Weather Risk Bridge service.

user.title: Weather Risk Bridge
user.description:
Connect to the Weather Risk Bridge service and set the US location to track.

Service URL: keep http://weather-risk-bridge:8099 when using the Supervisor add-on.

Latitude / Longitude: enter your place in decimal degrees (US west longitudes are negative). Values often pre-fill from Home Assistant's home location (Settings → System → General); change them if this entry should track somewhere else.

Label: friendly name such as Home (becomes the entity slug).

US locations only (NWS/SPC).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Weather Risk Bridge
reconfigure.description: Update the service connection and the latitude/longitude for this location. Add-on default URL is http://weather-risk-bridge:8099.

init.title: Weather Risk Bridge options
init.description: Update the service connection and the latitude/longitude for this location. Add-on default URL is http://weather-risk-bridge:8099.
